untranslatable_reason: Broadening Formations (Right-Angled and Descending) require detection of diverging upper and lower trend lines that expand over time. This pattern structure—characterized by increasing amplitude between highs and lows with a right angle or descending orientation—cannot be reliably expressed using available point-in-time indicators (price, MA, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, Donchian, etc.). The pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis of trend line slopes and their divergence, which is not supported by the indicator set. Additionally, the measure rule for exit targeting is undefined (avg_rise/avg_decline=UNKNOWN), and success statistics are unknown, making quantitative exit conditions impossible to establish. Recommend manual chart review or custom multi-bar structural indicator.
